description: next/ v4 — REAL ERP (erpdb.llm_test_v3.order_confirmations) projected onto the Level-3 MOM OperationsResponse = IST/Rückmeldung (SMProfile-OperationsResponse). This is the REAL Ist-source (replaces the sim-v5-mom-operations-response REST projection that re-read the order row). Keyed on production_order_no (1:1 with confirmations today; kgIdProperty + cross-rule join key). confirmed_qty → quantity_produced drives the qty_shortfall cross-rule against ProductionOrder.qty_planned. confirmation_time → actual_end_time/completed_at (the real Ist completion timestamp — late_delivery stays parked + is also gated on status eq 'offen'). order_confirmations has NO status column, but every confirmation IS a completion → status is bound to the constant 'fertig' ({ const: 'fertig', smAttribute: 'status' }) so the OperationsResponse contract is complete and the cross-rule when-gates evaluate correctly (the reconciler treats a missing when-attr as 'unknown' and skips — so the constant is load-bearing): qty_shortfall (gate status NE 'offen' → 'fertig' ≠ 'offen' → runs) fires the Plan-vs-Ist shortfall; material_unavailable + late_delivery (gate status EQ 'offen' → 'fertig' ≠ 'offen' → precond not met) stay dormant (correct — and WMS edge is down anyway). NO filter — full real backlog (all confirmations, incl. the closed-order archive) per the cutover decision. scrap_qty/cycle_time_actual/operator_id unmapped (not in the profile contract).
